name: Labels
description: Is slightly convex anteriorly and contains the anterior tubercle.
It provides attachment for the anterior atlanto-occipital membrane and lateral parts of the anterior longitudinal ligament.
Posterior surface contains the articular facet for the dens of CV2 (Axis).
The superior surface contains a groove for the vertebral artery.
The superior border provides attachment for the posterior atlanto-occipital membrane.
